_meta.description: Data shapes for the Fleet screen. Tracks collectors registered under the org, their activity, and collection handoffs. The org's operational record and each collector's Canopy identity are built by the same events — a handoff writes to both. Route sharing is always opt-in from the collector.

FleetCollector._description: A collector operating under this org's fleet. Linked by collectorUid to the collector's user document. Org sees aggregated stats. Collector retains full ownership of their own profile and history.

profile._description: Denormalized snapshot from users/{uid} — updated by Cloud Function on profile change.
profile.phoneNumber: string | null — only visible to org admin

assignment.assignedZoneIds: array<string> — collectionZone IDs this collector operates within

FleetCollector.status: enum: active | off_shift | uncontactable | inactive | suspended

routeSharing.enabled: boolean — collector-controlled opt-in. Org cannot set this to true.
routeSharing.currentRouteGeoJsonUrl: string | null — today's GPS track. Expires at midnight.

stats.thisMonthKg: number — rolling aggregate, resets on 1st of month

FleetCollector.invitedBy: string | null — uid of org rep who invited this collector
FleetCollector.notes: string | null — internal org notes, not visible to collector

CollectionHandoff._description: Logged when a collector delivers material to the org's hub or drop-off. One event creates two records: this document under the org, and a MarketplaceTransaction under the top-level collection. Both reference each other.

material.category: enum: plastics | metals | glass | paper_cardboard | rubber_composites | reclaimed_wood | textiles | electronics
material.impactScore: number | null — 0 to 100 environmental impact rating

financials.softPlasticBonus: boolean — extra points for carrier bags and film

location.label: string — hub or drop-off name, e.g. Kibera Hub

CollectionHandoff.zoneId: string | null — zone the material was collected from

FleetCollectorCardVM._description: Shape consumed by the fleet collector card widget.
FleetCollectorCardVM.primaryZoneLabel: string | null — e.g. Kibera Zone A
FleetCollectorCardVM.status: enum: active | off_shift | uncontactable | inactive | suspended
FleetCollectorCardVM.statusLabel: string — Active today | Off shift | Uncontactable | Inactive | Suspended

stats.lastDeliveryLabel: string — e.g. Today | Yesterday | 3 days ago | Never

HandoffLogEntryVM._description: Shape for entries in the Today's Handoffs list.

RouteMapVM._description: Shape for the route log section. Rendered as a lite-mode Google Map or placeholder.
RouteMapVM.routeLines: array<{collectorName: string, geoJsonUrl: string, color: Color}>

EnvFleetScreenState._description: Local state for the Fleet screen.
EnvFleetScreenState.filterStatus: enum: all | active | off_shift | uncontactable — default all

logHandoffSheet._description: State for the Log Collection Handoff bottom sheet.

inviteCollectorSheet._description: State for inviting a new collector to the fleet.
inviteCollectorSheet.phoneNumber: string — used to look up existing Canopy user
